findings.actual_issue: WebSocket connection failure, not white screen
findings.user_perception: White screen due to collapsed sidebar UI
findings.root_cause: simple-server.js running instead of full server.ts
findings.ui_state: React app rendering correctly with sidebar (-translate-x-full)

patterns.false_positive: User reported white screen but app was rendering
patterns.ui_confusion: Collapsed sidebar creates impression of empty page
patterns.websocket_dependency: App functionality depends on WebSocket connection

solutions.ui_fix: Ensure sidebar is visible on page load

learning.debug_approach: Use Playwright for visual validation first
learning.server_validation: Always check which server process is running
learning.comprehensive_testing: Test both frontend rendering AND backend connectivity
